degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial strategy review approved the one-path v0.1.0 Datadog HTTP decision.
Implementation-readiness review requested a concrete HTTP surface instead of a generic Datadog HTTP label.
Updated export-strategy.md to select the direct Datadog LLM Observability trace spans HTTP API and explicitly exclude generic traces, logs, Agent-only, SDK-only, and OTLP paths for v0.1.0.
Focused re-review approved with no blocking findings.
